name: Warrior
description: Class specializing in heavy strikes with deadly precision

skills.name: Heavy Blow
skills.description: Deal 10% more damage, but reduce attack speed by 5%.

skills.name: Overkill
skills.description: When dealing a killing blow, deal 25% of overkill damage to the next enemy.

skills.name: Bloodrage
skills.description: After killing an enemy, gain 5% more damage for 10 seconds.
